title: astragalus incanus subsp. incurvus
intro: Astragalus incanus subsp. incurvus is a sub-species of the Astragalus incanus plant, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae), which is a type of legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Astragalus incanus subsp. incurvus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus incanus subsp. incurvus is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
